exporters.notes: Fresnilloplc is the world's largest primary silver producer and Mexico's largest gold producer.
China is a significant importer of silver ores and concentrates from Mexico.
Korea is a significant importer of silver ores and concentrates from Mexico.
Bulgaria is a smaller importer of silver ores and concentrates from Mexico.
The European Union is a smaller importer of silver ores and concentrates from Mexico.
Canada is a smaller importer of silver ores and concentrates from Mexico.
